cadence_note: data.europa.eu re-harvests its ~210 federated catalogs continuously rather than on a published release schedule; catalog_record.modified on the freshest dataset is typically hours old (observed 2026-07-10). Weekly is a pragmatic cadence for a metadata catalog of ~48k datasets: it tracks new registrations and de-registrations without re-scrolling the full corpus daily. No incremental query is exposed, so each run is a full re-pull.
